INTERNAL MEMORANDUM

TO:   All Engineering Staff
FROM: R. Okafor, VP Engineering
DATE: 2025-03-10
RE:   Quarterly Infrastructure Review

This memo summarises the outcomes from last week's infrastructure review
meeting and the action items assigned.

SUMMARY OF FINDINGS

1. CI pipeline median build time increased from 6 min to 11 min over Q4.
   Root cause: test parallelism reduced after the runner pool was cut.
   Action: restore the pool to 20 runners by March 31 (owner: DevOps).

2. Database p99 query latency spiked on Jan 15 due to a missing index on
   the user_events table.  Index has since been added; latency is nominal.

3. S3 egress costs rose 28 % in Q4.  Audit revealed large log archives
   were being served directly rather than via CloudFront.
   Action: migrate log delivery to CloudFront by April 15 (owner: Infra).

NEXT STEPS

All owners are expected to provide status updates at the April 7 all-hands.
Please direct questions to the #infra-review Slack channel.
